episodes.title: Coercive Control, Johnny Depp v. Amber Heard & Family Court Collusion | Dr. Cocchiola, Therapist & LCSW Weighs In
episodes.description: We brought in someone with a much bigger brain than ours. Dr. Christine Cocchiola is an expert on coercive control, was involved in the Johnny Depp v. Amber Heard case, is way too familiar with Ty & Syd from The Nightmare Upstairs, and has spent years helping parents navigate toxic relationships, weaponized children, alienation accusations, and family court. If you've ever wondered whether you're dealing with high conflict, coercive control, or a court system that seems determined to make everything worse, this episode is for you. For free resources from Dr. Christine Cocchiola on how to navigate coercive control and other high conflict issues visit: www.iknowyourheart.com https://www.highconflicthell.com/?utm_source=ig&utm_medium=social&utm_content=link_in_bio&fbclid=PAZXh0bgNhZW0CMTEAc3J0YwZhcHBfaWQMMjU2MjgxMDQwNTU4AAGn5xLFQKCaDCsVmeSwyQtuMydN-_xRj95O7286KH9LquDyIjAbTmDGt9baG9s_aem_0haCDjtc8nivJDk4bCOUpQ https://www.youtube.com/@highconflicthell https://www.instagram.com/highconflicthell/ https://www.tiktok.com/@highconflicthell
